---
title: "Gallery"
lightbox: true
toc: true
---

## + seasons +

::: photo-row
![Dec '25 First winter in midwest :-\>](figs/2512.jpg){group="home"}

![Jan '26 cold rain](figs/2601.jpg){group="home"}

:::

:::{.photo-row}
![Feb '26 spring for us: invasive flowers and invasive human beings](figs/2602.jpg){group="home"}
:::

---

Pete Townshend.![](figs/gifs_7.gif)
